# Astia Web - AI Crawler Guidance

## Overview

Astia Web is a productized website service for independent hotels, built on Astro and maintained by AI agents.

## Contact

- Email: marcorosso.consulting@gmail.com
- Phone: +41 76 433 5845

## Key Pages

- / - Homepage
- /how-it-works - Our process explained
- /pricing - Service tiers and pricing
- /journal - Insights on hospitality web design
- /apply - Application form for new properties

## Content Policy

- All content is original and proprietary
- Case studies are published with client permission
- Pricing is subject to change
